name: River Battery
notes: Rivergate's specialty defense, in addition to the generic Turret/Missile Launcher every base gets. A Turret variant (see "extends") trading Air targeting for a bonus against Naval targets — Rivers are naval-passable all the way inland from the sea, so without this an enemy fleet could otherwise sail straight past a river base uncontested. Must be placed adjacent to Water (Ocean or River) so it can actually cover the crossing it exists to defend.
